payload.description: Offset bus lanes (one lane from the curb), SBS Bus Bulb Station, curbside local bus stops, median pedestrian refuge, pedestrian neckdowns, three general lanes in each direction, curbside parking & delivery space, service roads are local access and buses only
payload.location_text: Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards, Queens

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards, Queens

payload.description: Curbside bus lanes in the main road, SBS station on expanded median, local bus stops on expanded median, median refuges, calm service roads, shorter pedestrian crossings, two thru traffic lanes in each direction, one local traffic lane and parking in each direction, left-turn bays at non-stations
payload.location_text: Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards, Queens

normalized_location.raw_text: Woodhaven and Cross Bay Boulevards, Queens

payload.description: Median bus lanes, passing bus lane at stations, median SBS station, median local bus stops, center median at non-stations, pedestrian neckdowns at selected locations, three traffic lanes in each direction, parking lane with rush hour parking restrictions at select locations, left-turn bays at non-stations
